## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/EjHMMW-xpmbCz18NhBz6HvXHMYm7rVmu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [PSEO content strategy progressing: new article drafted for review, implementing previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EjHMMW-xpmbCz18NhBz6HvXHMYm7rVmu?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Content review process shifting: GrowthX to send 10 weekly articles directly to SchoolAI coaches for faster, more informed editing](https://fathom.video/share/EjHMMW-xpmbCz18NhBz6HvXHMYm7rVmu?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Strong performance: August saw 43k+ more clicks, improved rankings vs. July](https://fathom.video/share/EjHMMW-xpmbCz18NhBz6HvXHMYm7rVmu?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Experiment planned: testing key takeaways placement (top vs. bottom) on high-performing content to optimize for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/EjHMMW-xpmbCz18NhBz6HvXHMYm7rVmu?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

      - [Graham finishing backlog (paid extra month)](https://fathom.video/share/EjHMMW-xpmbCz18NhBz6HvXHMYm7rVmu?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
